description_for_human: Free, EU-jurisdiction scanner that measures any public website's AI-agent readiness across 17 technical checks.
description_for_model: Use agent.opensverige to scan a public domain for AI-agent readiness. Returns 17 checks across three categories — discovery (robots.txt, sitemap, llms.txt, llms-full.txt, markdown content negotiation, SSR content, AI crawler access), EU compliance (privacy automation, cookie handling, EU AI Act Art. 50 AI-disclosure), and builder surface (API existence, OpenAPI spec, API docs, MCP server, MCP well-known, MCP server card, sandbox availability). Each check returns pass/fail with severity (critical/important/info). Total score becomes a green/yellow/red badge. Data lives in EU (Supabase eu-west-2 London), retained 90 days. License FSL-1.1-MIT. POST /api/v1/scan with { domain } and Authorization: Bearer osv_(test|live)_<24chars>; returns synchronously in 10-30s. Free hobby tier.
